title: Partner
bio: Physician, ex-McKinsey strategy consultant with experience in healthcare financing, health system design and health tech strategy. Experienced healthcare startup operator and former US venture studio partner. Deep expertise in health technology and health strategy expert in AU and US. Military officer and veteran.

title: Partner
bio: Physician (General Practice), healthcare strategist and clinical governance leader. Advisory experience to federal and state government agencies, corporate healthcare groups, investors and NFPs. President of AMA (NSW), with extensive chief medical officer experience. Military medical officer and veteran.

title: Partner
bio: Physician (General Practice), ex-Deloitte (NYC) healthcare strategy and operations consultant with deep experience in payor/provider strategy, operations, and healthcare innovation, including joint ventures, in-house innovation labs, startup builds and industry collaboration. Military medical officer and veteran.

title: Associate Partner
bio: Physician (anaesthetics and critical care), ex-McKinsey strategy consultant with deep experience leading strategy, transformation and analytics consulting projects. Advisory experience to multiple public and private healthcare institutions with specialisation in commercial due diligence.

title: Associate Partner
bio: Board-certified emergency medicine physician, researcher, and academic leader. Has previously held academic appointments at the Mount Sinai School of Medicine, the Albert Einstein College of Medicine, and most recently served as an Associate Professor of Emergency Medicine at the Zucker School of Medicine at Hofstra/Northwell.

title: Associate Partner
bio: Physician, ex-L.E.K strategy consultant, ex-health insurance executive and co-founder with expertise in healthcare and corporate strategy, health and life insurance, innovation, corporate ventures, start-ups and scale-ups. Previous Chief of Staff to CEO, GM Strategy at a major Australian private health insurer, and CEO of a PHI venture with strong experience with C-suite, board, government and regulatory stakeholders.

title: Associate Partner
bio: Physician, biomedical engineer, digital health consultant. Medical device expert (Abbott, Draeger, Johnson & Johnson, Stryker), with track record across regulatory, R&D, public-private partnerships, healthcare strategy and innovation, complex program management, executive stakeholder engagement. Former co-founder, early team and advisor to medtech & digital health startups.

title: Associate Partner
bio: Experienced healthcare operations executive. Vice President of Strategic Planning in Clinical Digital Solutions at Northwell Health, Assistant Professor of the Department of Science Education at the Zucker School of Medicine. Specializes in strategic planning and implementation of innovative care delivery models. Former Booz and Company healthcare strategy consultant.

title: Associate Partner
bio: Transformation executive and ex-McKinsey Engagement Manager with deep operational experience in the Australian pathology and diagnostics sector. Former Head of Digital & Strategy at a major national healthcare provider, with expertise in scaling value creation programs and driving commercial acceleration. Proven track record in scaling technology ventures, having established the ANZ footprint for a global AI enterprise platform.

title: Director
bio: US-trained emergency medicine physician, global public health scientist and health tech ventures advisor. Former Venture Medical Director at Aegis Ventures. Director of Innovation and Health Equity at a major US hospital. Expertise in clinical and public health due diligence and analysis.

title: Senior Manager
bio: Physician and experienced healthcare strategy consultant. Ex-L.E.K. Consulting, where he advised global pharma and medtech clients on asset valuation, market access strategy, and M&A transactions. Held senior policy roles at the UK Department of Health & Social Care and the New Zealand Treasury, guiding multi-billion-dollar health budgets and system performance improvements.

title: Manager
bio: Physician (General Practice). Healthcare consultant, ex Port Jackson Partners (tier 1 consulting firm) with experience in healthcare strategy. Extensive experience working with various advocacy organizations.

title: Office Manager
bio: Veteran executive assistant, administrative manager, and marketing and social media manager with experience in multinational organizations.

title: Expert Consultant
bio: Physician and digital health leader with deep experience across clinical operations, health service performance, analytics, and product-led digital delivery. Ex-PwC & Scyne strategy consultant, advising public and private health services on digital transformation and clinically led service design. Currently Digital Health Lead for the Mater Group.

title: Expert Consultant
bio: Medical doctor and public health trainee with experience across Australia, the United States, Japan, and India. Simone has worked across diagnostics, biotechnology, hospitals, aged care, consulting, and global health academia. An ex-Harvard scholar and former McKinsey consultant, she brings a creative, whole-of-system lens to advancing tackling health system challenges, including prevention, equity, digital health, and sustainable care.

title: Expert Consultant
bio: Physician. Seasoned health tech product leader with experience building digital health products and leading product teams across population-based data analytics, ward task management, mobile patient engagement, patient-reported outcome measures, and primary care.

title: Expert Consultant
bio: Physician. Public Health Specialist and academic, with experience advising public policy and health financing for the NFPs and NGOs, including the World Health Organization. Fellow in Health Systems at the Australian National University and Policy Fellow at the Australian Department of Prime Minister and Cabinet.

title: Expert Consultant
bio: Physician, public health and clinical trials expert for multinational pharmaceutical firms. SME in microbiome research, previous deputy chief medical officer and medical director.

title: Expert Consultant
bio: Physician, cardiology. After medical training in New Zealand, he read for a dual MBA and MPH as a Fulbright scholar. He was an Innovation Fellow at Massachusetts General Hospital and was chosen for a Flagship Pioneering Fellowship in 2023.

title: Senior Consultant
bio: Physician, ex-McKinsey strategy consultant, productivity expert, and content creator with 3M+ dedicated following. Experience in healthcare strategy, health system design, capital excellence, operating model, and org design. SME in social media marketing and strategy.

title: Consultant
bio: Physician, previous leadership experience as an Edtech founder and CEO, President of the Melbourne University Health Initiative, and UN Youth Australia National Executive member. Previous experience in clinical and biomedical research, student-consulting team lead with experience in financial modelling and commercial due diligence.

title: Consultant
bio: Public health expert. Healthcare consultant with a background in U.S. health policy, global health care delivery, epidemic response, behavioral health programs, and population health scientific research. Proficient in project coordination and management, with a focus on emergency preparedness, health equity, and public health crisis management.

title: Consultant
bio: Current medical student with over 7 years of previous experience as a management consultant focused on the public and health sectors. Prior projects included health system design and reform, transformation programme design and establishment and operating model reviews working with all levels of government including Ministers, board members, commissioners and Tier 2 and 3 executives.

title: Consultant
bio: Nutritionist and biostatistician with experience across health systems in Australia, Europe, South East Asia, and the Middle East. Focused on digital and data transformation, system planning, and service redesign, with a background in public health delivery and research. Passionate about building systems that help people live healthier lives.

title: Consultant
bio: Physician (emergency medicine), public health scientist and strategy consultant with experience in national-level health systems design, program and transformation delivery across multiple countries.

title: Consultant
bio: Radiologist, health informatician and healthcare strategist. Experience across diagnostic imaging, digital health, clinical governance and medical workforce leadership. Chair of the AMA Council of Doctors in Training, with a strong focus on applying innovation and technology to improve patient care and health system performance.

title: Junior Consultant
bio: Physician with prior experience in health policy, health tech startups, AI research and financial markets. Driven by mission to shape equitable and innovative healthcare reform at a systems level with a particular interest in digital health tools and the successful implementation of AI in healthcare settings.

title: Junior Consultant
bio: Physician with extensive involvement in governance and advocacy. Former President of the Australian Medical Students' Association and current appointed member of the Australian Medical Council, with research experience at leading national policy organisations. Keen interests in the intersection of primary care, public health, and rural health.

title: Junior Consultant
bio: Physician with experience in investment banking, sales and marketing management, national health policy, and AI research with multiple publications.

title: Senior Analyst
bio: Medical student. Passionate about impacting healthcare at scale through a career at the intersection of medicine, research, and business. Prior experience in Venture Capital, management consulting and research with several publications. Former special forces medic, and veteran.

title: Analyst
bio: Medical student. Experience in MedTech development and big data research in cardiology and perioperative medicine. Active in clinical trials management, digital health and bioinnovation initiatives. Passionate about the intersection of medicine, technology, and systems improvement.

title: Analyst
bio: Medical student with a strong foundation in clinical research and leadership roles in digital health and primary care initiatives. Previous experience in leading departmental research, contributing to international collaborations and presenting at national meetings. Passionate about AI-driven healthcare innovation and improving healthcare accessibility through scalable, patient-centred solutions.

title: Analyst
bio: Final year medical student with involvement in digital health, including the implementation of AI scribes across the New Zealand health system. Content creator with 300K+ long-form content views on YouTube. Current leadership involvement in various student-led educational ventures, and inspired to create sustainable impact in healthcare via innovation and education.

title: Analyst
bio: Medical student passionate about systems innovation and harnessing technology to advance patient-centred models of healthcare. Previous involvement in AI startups, business strategy, and healthtech consulting.

title: Analyst
bio: Medical student. Passionate about digital health, translational research and data-driven innovation. Experience in health tech startups and ongoing involvement in digital health research and analysis of real-world healthcare data. Driven to bridge clinical insight with strategic thinking to enable healthcare transformation and enact systems-level change.

title: Analyst
bio: Medical student with experience in clinical neuroscience research, health systems strategy, and New Zealand intelligence. Involved in healthcare consulting and startup development, with an interest in the intersections between healthcare, research, and business.

title: Analyst
bio: Medical student with experience in streamlining clinical trials through digital platforms. Inspired to optimise patient and client experience through combining healthcare-specific knowledge with systems analysis and business strategies.

title: Analyst
bio: Current medical student. Prior experience within financial markets (quantitative trading, equity research), business development and strategy, management consulting and medical research. Keen interest in exploring the intersection between public health and business to drive healthcare innovation and better patient outcomes.

title: Analyst
bio: Post-graduate with experience in private investors, business research, analysis and development. Involved in startup developments and investment financial analysis with a passion for the intersection between healthcare, business and investment.
